hero.description: Experience a vibrant 100-acre campus in Bangalore where academic excellence meets a dynamic student community. From world-class facilities to diverse student activities, this is more than a campus — it's your home.

header.title: Campus
header.description: Explore world-class infrastructure designed to support academic excellence and student life.

facilitiesSection.intro: Presidency University offers a modern campus equipped with advanced academic, recreational, and support facilities to enhance student learning and overall student experience.

items.title: High-Speed Wi-Fi
items.desc: Fully networked campus across academic and residential buildings.

items.title: Computer Labs
items.desc: Advanced labs equipped with modern hardware and licensed software tools.

items.title: AI & Robotics Labs
items.desc: Dedicated research labs for AI, Machine Learning, IoT, VLSI, and Robotics.

items.title: Design Labs
items.desc: Specialised design studios for communication, fashion, product, and spatial design.

items.title: Media Labs
items.desc: Professional studios supporting journalism, media, and communication students.

items.title: Experience Centres
items.desc: Hands-on exposure to emerging technologies and innovation ecosystems.

items.title: Moot Court
items.desc: Practical legal training environment for law and justice studies.

items.title: Central Library
items.desc: Digital resources, research journals, study spaces, and searchable online archives.

items.title: Sports Complex
items.desc: Indoor and outdoor sports, athletics, and fitness facilities for students.

items.title: Auditoriums
items.desc: Modern seminar halls and large event spaces for conferences and performances.

items.title: Wellness Centre
items.desc: Student wellbeing, counselling, and healthcare support services.

items.title: Accessible Campus
items.desc: Inclusive facilities designed for students with disabilities (Divyangjan).

header.title: Student
header.description: Comfortable, secure, and modern accommodation designed for student life.

housingSection.description: The hostels include separate blocks for male and female students, including a new boys’ hostel with a capacity of 1,700 students. Additional facilities such as laundry rooms, common rooms with TV, indoor and outdoor games, and hot and cold purified drinking water are also available. Rooms are allotted on a first-come, first-served basis and cannot be changed once assigned, so students are advised to apply early.

features.title: Furnished Rooms
features.desc: Twin & triple-sharing rooms with Wi-Fi and storage.

features.title: Dining
features.desc: Four meals daily with veg & non-veg options.

features.title: 24×7 Security
features.desc: CCTV monitoring, wardens, and safety support.

features.title: Transport
features.desc: Weekend transport to Yelahanka and city access.

features.title: Health Support
features.desc: Medical room, nurse, and emergency ambulance.

housingSection.note: For students who prefer to live off-campus, the university’s student services team can assist in identifying reputable private accommodation near Yelahanka and Bangalore city.

header.title: Student Clubs & Activities at
header.description: Life at Presidency extends far beyond the lecture hall. The Department of Student Affairs (DSA) coordinates over 50 active clubs spanning cultural, technical, social, and management domains.

clubsSection.intro: Every Friday, clubs host structured activities and events, ensuring that student life has a steady, year-round rhythm of engagement. The DSA also runs a wide calendar of festivals, national day celebrations, talk series, and leadership sessions throughout the academic year.

events.title: Kaleidoscope
events.desc: The flagship cultural festival bringing together talent from across India.

events.title: TechBiz
events.desc: A 24-hour high-intensity tech and business innovation challenge.

events.title: Eunoia
events.desc: An immersive arts festival celebrating creativity and expression.

sports.title: Sports & Athletics
sports.desc: Inter-collegiate teams compete across cricket, football, basketball, badminton, and more. The Motor Sports Club adds an engineering edge to athletics.
